title: Entry Identity, Idempotent Upserts, Version History, and Tombstones · Transfer Build
summary: An independent university archive receives a different publisher mix, unknown XML shape, validator state, tenant, async schedule, database condition, accessibility need, platform, and injected failure and transfers entry identity, idempotent upserts, version history, and tombstones into a changed versioned idempotent entry repository. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of versioned idempotent entry repository with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress…
objectives: Scope external IDs to feed and format semantics, detect collisions, and preserve the raw identity basis and parser version.
Return explicit inserted, unchanged, revised, conflicting, quarantined, or rejected results from atomic constraints and comparison.
Store bounded meaningful revisions with field diff, fetch identity, timestamps, and correction or moderation cause.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Ts Scoped Entry Key
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab TypeScript team handles case 9185 during a hostile XML and unknown-value admission drill. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove scoped identity, typed upsert outcomes, revisions, tombstones, and replay convergence; publisher fetch and retention budgets must remain explicit; then change one RSS, Atom, namespace, entity, date, identity, or runtime-validation case and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, fast-xml-parser, Express, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, handle and load claims, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Scope external IDs to feed and format semantics, detect collisions, and preserve the raw identity basis and parser version.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Feed aggregation and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Feed Ts Scoped Entry Key.
